title: Voice-to-Observation Schema v1
description: Canonical schema for the FIRST stage of the FOUNDER_FIELD_AUDIT_TO_WORKFLOW_COMPILER: turning spoken defect reports into structured, deduplicable Observations. An AuditSession holds VoiceNote(s); each VoiceNote is transcribed into a Transcript (raw + normalized + optional translation); the Transcript is compiled into Observation[]. AUTHORITY: this stage runs in /sandbox with authority=none. It only reads voice and emits structured data — it CANNOT deploy, merge, delete, send, or mutate any canonical surface. Downstream (IssueCluster -> WorkflowContract -> SandboxJob -> VerificationRun -> Receipt -> ApprovalItem) is defined in _SPINE_v1.json and RECEIPT_SCHEMA_FIELD_AUDIT_v1.json. Field names here are load-bearing and MUST match those files exactly.

defect_kind.description: Closed enum grounded 1:1 in the 10 spine templates, plus 'other' for un-routable spans. Each value maps to exactly one template_id via _SPINE_v1.templates[].

surface_kind.description: What kind of surface the founder is auditing. Determines which templates are eligible.

AuditSession.description: Top-level container for one founder audit pass against one target surface. Foreign keys thread the whole pipeline; the same session_id appears on every downstream object.

target_url.description: Founder-supplied TARGET_URL for this audit. Sandbox jobs run against THIS ref only. MUST NOT be hardcoded to any live production surface by the compiler; supplied per-session by the founder. Nullable when target_ref (a repo/workflow ref) is used instead.

target_ref.description: Founder-supplied git ref / repo path / workflow id when surface_kind is repo or workflow. One of target_url or target_ref MUST be present.

authority.description: This stage never holds execution authority.

VoiceNote.description: One captured spoken utterance (audio blob reference) inside a session. Points at exactly one Transcript once transcription completes.

audio_ref.description: Sandbox-local path or blob key for the captured audio. Never a live external URL.

source_lang.description: BCP-47 tag detected/declared at capture, e.g. 'en', 'fa'. May be refined on the Transcript.

Transcript.description: Deterministic-normalized text of one VoiceNote. text_raw is verbatim ASR output; text_normalized applies stable, replayable normalization (lowercasing of surface tokens, number-word expansion e.g. 'twelve thousand dollar' -> '$12,000', 'six-week' -> '8-week', punctuation/whitespace canon). If source_lang != 'en', translated=true and text_translated carries the English working text used for extraction.

text_translated.description: English working text when translated=true; MUST equal text_normalized when translated=false or be omitted.

normalization_ops.description: Ordered, replayable record of the pure transforms applied raw->normalized, so normalization is auditable and deterministic.

Observation.description: One atomic defect the founder asserted, sliced from a Transcript. This is the compiler's structured unit. defect_kind selects the downstream template; target_hint is the founder's phrase for the surface element (resolved to a concrete surface_ref/selector later). Nothing here is verified yet — severity_guess and confidence are heuristic.

transcript_id.description: FK -> Transcript.id this span was cut from.

raw_span.description: The exact substring of text_normalized (or text_translated) that produced this observation. Provenance anchor.

surface_ref.description: Best-effort concrete pointer into the target surface: a route path, CSS selector, href, or component name. May be a placeholder like 'unresolved:<target_hint>' until the sandbox job resolves it against the founder's TARGET_URL. NEVER a hardcoded live production URL at compile time.

target_hint.description: Founder's own words for the element, e.g. 'Apply for Program link', 'Cookie link', 'Sign-in'.

needs_translation.description: True when the raw_span originated from a non-English Transcript and relied on text_translated.
